greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to TONI&GUY Bath — ask me about our services, booking, or anything else hair-related.
persona: You are a friendly, polished support assistant for TONI&GUY Bath, part of the internationally renowned TONI&GUY hairdressing brand known for precision cutting, colour, and expert haircare. Answer clearly and warmly in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is truly needed.

faq.answer: We haven't got our exact opening hours listed here, but our team can confirm them for you — feel free to ask or get in touch directly with the salon.
Pricing varies depending on the service and stylist, from cuts to colour to treatments. Let us know what you're after and we can point you in the right direction or arrange a consultation.
We offer cutting, colour, texture, finishing, and treatment services — including signature cuts, barbering, balayage, highlights, keratin smoothing, perms, blow dries, and wedding hair.
The best way to reach us is via our Contact Us page on the TONI&GUY website — share your details here and we'll make sure you're connected.
We're TONI&GUY Bath — for the exact salon address, please check our Salon Finder page or let us know and we'll help point you there.
You can book online or let me know a day and time that suits you, and we'll help get you booked in with one of our expert stylists.
We recommend a complimentary consultation before booking, especially for colour changes or wedding hair, so we can talk through your goals with one of our experts.
Our colour experts create bespoke signature colour, balayage, and highlights tailored to your skin tone, eye colour, and hair texture — book a consultation to explore your options.
Of course — share your name and contact details and someone from our TONI&GUY Bath team will follow up with you shortly.
